title: Introducing WiamLabs
excerpt: WiamLabs is the technology house behind WiamApp and WiamTrade — built in Ghana for Africa.
author: WiamLabs
body: WiamLabs is a Ghana-based technology company founded by Martin. Our mission is to build digital products that solve real problems for African users — with trust, clarity, and world-class design.
Today we operate two live products: WiamApp, a services marketplace that connects customers with verified workers, and WiamTrade, a non-custodial trading platform inside Telegram.
This website is our home on the open web. Search for WiamLabs — we are here.

title: WiamApp: Marketplace for Africa
excerpt: How WiamApp helps customers book verified workers in their city in real time.
author: WiamLabs
body: Finding reliable skilled workers should not be a gamble. WiamApp brings verified professionals — electricians, plumbers, cleaners, and more — into one trusted marketplace.
Customers book in real time. Workers build formal reputation. Everyone wins when trust is built into the product from day one.

title: WiamTrade: Practice Trading on Live Markets
excerpt: Practice crypto, forex, and African stocks with $1M virtual — then go live when you are ready.
author: WiamLabs
body: WiamTrade lets you practice on live market charts with $1M virtual capital — no broker API keys required. Switch to live mode only when you choose to connect your exchange.
We never hold your funds. Your keys, your trades, your control.
